channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jigawa man arrested for allegedly setting father on fire
item.description: A 27-year-old man, Kabiru Nuhu, has been arrested by the Jigawa State Police for allegedly setting his 60-year-old father on fire in the Magama Quarters of Kazaure Local Government Area. The incident ...

item.title: Peckham Stabbing: Four Arrested After Man Dies
item.description: Police in South East London have arrested four men in connection with a fatal stabbing that occurred early Monday morning in Peckham. Officers were called to Ruby Street, near a nightclub, at approxim...

item.title: Superintendent Benard Yegon’s Academic and Career Achievements Honoured by NPS
item.description: The National Police Service (NPS) has formally recognised Superintendent Dr Benard Kibet Yegon for his outstanding academic achievements and dedicated service. Yegon joined the police in 2007 as a con...

item.title: DSWD warns public about scam messages offering cash aid
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has issued a warning to the public about fraudulent chat messages that promise cash assistance in exchange for personal information. These scams...

item.title: Wireless festival maintains Kanye West performance despite controversy over antisemitism
item.description: The promoter of the Wireless Festival, Festival Republic, has confirmed that Kanye West, also known as Ye, is still scheduled to perform at the event, despite widespread criticism over his antisemitic...

item.title: South African Fuel Price Hikes Prompt Safety Warnings on Home Storage
item.description: As fuel prices continue their relentless climb in South Africa, a concerning trend is emerging: citizens are increasingly resorting to bulk purchasing and storing petrol at home. While understandable ...

item.title: Citihoms and Enugu State hold workshop to strengthen public financial management and accountability
item.description: Citihoms Finance Company don partner with Enugu State Government to organize one three-day workshop wey focus on how senior civil servants fit manage public funds well and improve accountability insid...

item.title: Madurai Court Sentences Nine Police Officers to Death for Custodial Deaths of Father and Son
item.description: In a landmark judgment, the First Additional District and Sessions Court in Madurai sentenced nine police officers to death for the custodial deaths of P Jeyaraj (58) and his son J Benniks (31) at Sat...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs secure comeback victory over Orbit College to climb into third place
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs fought back from a goal down to defeat Orbit College 3-1 at the Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium in Gqeberha on Monday, moving into third place in the Betway Premiership. The match began with ...

item.title: Think tank urges caution in joint oil exploration with China, stresses national interest and sovereignty
item.description: A Philippine think tank, Stratbase Institute, has urged President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.’s administration to carefully reconsider plans for a joint energy exploration deal with China in the West Philipp...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II Crew Sets Record for Farthest Human Journey from Earth During Lunar Flyby
item.description: On 6 April 2026, NASA’s Artemis II mission achieved a milestone in human space exploration as its four-astronaut crew became the farthest travellers from Earth in history. Commander Reid Wiseman, pilo...

item.title: Tom Steyer Faces Renewed Scrutiny Over Past Private Prison and Fossil Fuel Investments in California Governor’s Race
item.description: Tom Steyer, billionaire hedge fund founder and prominent Democratic donor, is under renewed criticism as he campaigns for California governor in the 2026 race. The controversy stems from past investme...

item.title: Three Members of Criminal Gang Arrested in Manila
item.description: Tatlong miyembro ng isang kriminal na gang sa Maynila ang nahuli ng mga awtoridad matapos ang isang operasyon sa Barangay 42. Ang mga suspek ay pinaniniwalaang kasangkot sa mga kasong tulad ng robbery...

item.title: Bugoy Drilon Opens Up About Personal Growth in Latest Album 'Anthems'
item.description: Filipino singer Bugoy Drilon is set to release his latest album titled 'Anthems,' where he aims to offer a deeper look into his personal journey and artistic growth. The album reflects Bugoy's experie...

item.title: Angel Reese traded from Chicago Sky to Atlanta Dream in exchange for future draft picks
item.description: The Chicago Sky have officially traded forward Angel Reese to the Atlanta Dream in exchange for two first-round draft selections, the team announced Monday. The 23-year-old Reese, who was the seventh ...

item.title: Sarah Lahbati explores Php 348 million apartment in Netflix’s 'The Parisian Agency'
item.description: Sarah Lahbati, a well-known Filipino actress and influencer, is looking to acquire a luxurious apartment in Paris worth Php 348 million as featured in Netflix’s reality show 'The Parisian Agency.' Thi...

item.title: Rebecca King Crews Opens Up About Secretly Battling Parkinson's Disease and New Hopeful Treatment
item.description: Rebecca King Crews, wife of actor Terry Crews, has been living with Parkinson's disease for over 16 years. She first noticed symptoms in 2012, including numbness in her left foot and a noticeable trem...

item.title: Exploring the Nuances of Male Friendship in DTF St. Louis
item.description: DTF St. Louis, a limited series streaming on HBO/Crave, provides a deeply human look at male friendship in contemporary suburban life. Created, written, and directed by Steve Conrad, the seven-episode...

item.title: Study reveals presence of contaminants and drugs in sharks near tourist areas of the Bahamas
item.description: A scientific study published in the journal *Environmental Pollution* has found traces of cocaine, caffeine, painkillers, and antidepressants in several shark species living off the coast of the Baham...

item.title: AI-generated song about police killer provokes public outrage
item.description: A recently released AI-generated song praising Dezi Freeman, a convicted police killer, has ignited widespread criticism and controversy across social media and news outlets. The song, created using a...
